title: Compressed Wooden Sword
description: Add compressed wooden sword, Single ~ Octuple compressed stick
body:
# Compressed Wooden Sword
The ultimate weapon crafted from 86 million sticks.

## 📋 Items

| Compression Level | Sticks Required |
|:-----------------:|:---------------:|
| Single            | 9               |
| Double            | 81              |
| Triple            | 729             |
| Quadruple         | 6,561           |
| Quintuple         | 59,049          |
| Sextuple          | 531,441         |
| Septuple          | 4,782,969       |
| Octuple           | 43,046,721      |
| **Sword**         | **86,093,443**  |

## 🔨 Crafting Recipes

**Sticks**: 9 of the same tier crafts into the next tier (3×3)

**Sword**:

[A]

[A]  →  Compressed Wooden Sword

[B]

A = Octuple Compressed Stick, B = Vanilla Stick

## ⚔️ Attributes
- Durability: ∞ (Infinite)
- Damage: ∞ (Infinite)
- Attack Speed: ~1,000,000,000

## 📥 Installation

1. Install Fabric (≥0.18.5)
2. Install Fabric API
3. Place in mods folder

**No other dependencies required.**

## 🌐 Supported Languages
简体中文 | English
